spec: D2-FINAL: real streams (extension=none), ZERO aux maps, 7 kept easings, 72 keep_shaders (blacklist applied at SAMPLING time), frozen gate tau=0.2543 / max_pure<=0.5 / seam<=2.0 / dq<=0.5, per-slot rejection sampling

policy_frozen.floor_leg: ABSENT by decision (non-gating metadata flag m1_min < -0.05 instead)
policy_frozen.blacklist_applied_at: sampling time (blacklisted shaders are never drawn)

build_state.status: HALTED at the render stage by the pre-committed clamp check
build_state.stage1_plan: COMPLETE + verified (3072 slots, see stage1_plan below)
build_state.param_clamp: IMPLEMENTED per the ruling + offline-verified (D2_CLAMP_CHECK.json: 21,600 draws over 72 shaders, 0 invariant violations)
build_state.stage2_render: KILLED. Array 9659414 (and its dependent encode 9659416 / assemble 9659417 / audit 9659415) cancelled after the first-chunk visual check FAILED the pre-committed 17.5% bar. See D2_FIRSTCHUNK_VISUAL.json.
build_state.stage5_train: config generator + sbatch written, NOT submitted (HELD pending owner approval regardless)

cancelled_earlier_render.why: MY implementation choice (timing frozen per slot to keep the timing law unbiased) made realized overdraw 7.35x vs the spec's 2.5x ceiling. Measured cause: slot difficulty is carried by the TIMING draw, not by params or shader — attempts-per-accepted-slot clustered at {1:165, 26:33, 51:6, 76:3}, where 26 = '5 shaders x 5 param redraws all failed, then ONE timing redraw passed immediately'. Only 4 slots were ever rescued by a shader swap. Fixed by redrawing timing per attempt (the plain reading of the spec, whose <2x budget assumes independent attempts); the 228 tuples accepted under the old procedure were DISCARDED so the whole dataset comes from one sampling procedure.
cancelled_earlier_render.consequence_to_report: with timing redrawn per attempt the delivered onset/release law is U[0,1]-derived CONDITIONED ON GATE PASS — the same conditioning the params already carry. Realized u1/u2 mean+sd are reported in stage2_render when the render completes.

measured_economics_for_the_next_launch.audit_reference_values: keep7-easings x 72 keep-shaders = 0.853 clip / 0.736 tuple; the policy's 0.5905 is keep7-easings over ALL 112 shaders
measured_economics_for_the_next_launch.render_cost: ~1.5 s/render on secondary, 16 shards; whole build ~25-30 min/shard

real_ic_gen_root_verified.checked: 2026-07-24, before assembly (repair of 770 links confirmed holding)
